nativeProps: HTML div attributes except owned change behavior

compositionPolicy.publicComponents: Composes canonical CommandPalette, Button, and Alert source items.
compositionPolicy.adapter: The consumer owns indexing, ranking, authorization, navigation, execution, analytics, persistence, network, and every side effect.
compositionPolicy.enhancements: Recent commands, shortcut labels, execution preview, result announcements, the global shortcut, and mobile entry are independent opt-ins.
